notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the kernel SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 30 CVEs: CVE-2021-47013, CVE-2025-39993, CVE-2025-21928, CVE-2024-57980, CVE-2025-21764, and 25 more.
